goal: Eliminate manual workflow observation, reconciliation, classification, comparison, bounded-history maintenance, frequency interpretation, stability interpretation, and all derived comparison-history maintenance while preserving fail-closed automation.
publication_chain: validate-chain-continuation generates and embeds the run receipt
full-validation-chain-report artifact transfers it to build-pages
build-pages publishes and reconciles bounded observation, transition, trend, frequency, stability, and comparison records
build-pages derives a bounded descriptive stability-change frequency and recency summary
build-pages emits a comparison receipt against prior public frequency and recency classes
build-pages reconciles the comparison receipt into bounded deduplicated comparison history
verify-public-pages checks the summary, comparison receipt, and comparison-history endpoints

stability_change_frequency_change_policy.comparison: current generated stability-change frequency and recency classes against prior public summary
stability_change_frequency_change_policy.prior_summary_unavailable_result: compare against AWAITING_AUTOMATED_STABILITY_CHANGE_FREQUENCY_SUMMARY without assigning a manual task

stability_change_frequency_change_histor.prior_history_unavailable_result: initialize a new bounded sequence without assigning a manual task

cancelled_run_policy: A cancelled run remains fail-closed and the next repository-owned trigger re-evaluates automatically.
external_evidence_policy: Missing external evidence remains deferred under declared owners and does not become a user task.
non_claims: This status proves automation contracts, not a successful future workflow run.
All summaries, comparisons, and bounded histories are descriptive, not predictive or independently causal.
It does not grant merge, release, deployment, publication, execution, or downstream mutation authority.
